attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
WPOS.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT   ,
WPOS.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY        ,
WPOS.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT     ,
WPOS.BK_ORGNL_OFFR_ATTRBTN_ID_INT  ,
WPOS.ATTRIBUTION_PCT               ,
WPOS.PRODUCT_ATTRIBUTED_QTY        ,
WPOS.UNIT_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT       ,
WPOS.UNIT_NET_PRICE_USD_AMT        ,
WPOS.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD           ,
WPOS.UNIT_GLOBAL_LST_PRC_USD_AMT   ,
WPOS.UNIT_WHOLESALE_LST_PRC_USD_AMT,
WPOS.EDW_CREATE_DTM    ,
WPOS.EDW_CREATE_USER,
 WPOS.EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
 WPOS.EDW_UPDATE_USER,              
WPOS.START_TV_DTM   ,
WPOS.END_TV_DTM       ,    
/* ADDED THE BELOW COLUMNS AS PART OF Q2FY15*/
WPOS.VERSION_ID_INT   ,
WPOS.OBSOLETE_FLG ,
WPOS.ATTRIBUTION_TOP_SKU_FLG ,
WPOS.TOP_SKU_POS_TRX_ID_INT ,
WPOS.EXCEPTION_REASON_CD ,
WPOS.EXCEPTION_STATUS_CD ,
WPOS.DISTI_POS_TRX_TYPE_CD /*Added as part of OA-POS Q4FY15 to distinguish different POS transactions*/
/* NRS MPOB Changes */
,WPOS.ATTRIBUTION_CD
,WPOS.PARENT_OFFER_ATTRIB_ID_INT
,WPOS.POB_TYPE_CD
,WPOS.DV_POB_TOP_PRDT_KEY
,WPOS.AS_ARCHITECTURE_FLG
,WPOS.BOOKINGS_POLICY_CD
/*Added as part of SFP FY21 March Rel*/
,WPOS.UNIT_NET_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT
,WPOS.UNIT_GLOBL_LIST_PRC_LCL_AMT
,WPOS.UNIT_WHOLESALE_LST_PRC_LCL_AMT
,WPOS.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_RATE
FROM
$$WORKDB.W_POS_TRX_LINE_OFFER_ATRBTN WPOS
WHERE WPOS.DML_TYPE='I'
AND NOT EXISTS (
SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_TRX_LINE_OFFER_ATRBTN_TV NPOS
WHERE WPOS.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT = NPOS.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
/*AND WPOS.START_TV_DTM = NPOS.START_TV_DTM --removed this condition as part of Q2fy15*/
)

SELECT 
NPOSTV.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT   ,
NPOSTV.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY        ,
NPOSTV.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT     ,
NPOSTV.BK_ORGNL_OFFR_ATTRBTN_ID_INT  ,
NPOSTV.ATTRIBUTION_PCT               ,
NPOSTV.PRODUCT_ATTRIBUTED_QTY        ,
NPOSTV.UNIT_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT       ,
NPOSTV.UNIT_NET_PRICE_USD_AMT        ,
NPOSTV.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD           ,
NPOSTV.UNIT_GLOBAL_LST_PRC_USD_AMT   ,
NPOSTV.UNIT_WHOLESALE_LST_PRC_USD_AMT,
NPOSTV.EDW_CREATE_DTM    ,
NPOSTV.EDW_CREATE_USER,
 NPOSTV.EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
 NPOSTV.EDW_UPDATE_USER ,
 /*ADDED THE BELOW COLUMNS AS PART OF  OFFER ATTRIBUTION Q2FY15*/
 NPOSTV.VERSION_ID_INT,
 NPOSTV.OBSOLETE_FLG,
NPOSTV.ATTRIBUTION_TOP_SKU_FLG,
NPOSTV.TOP_SKU_POS_TRX_ID_INT,
NPOSTV.EXCEPTION_REASON_CD,
NPOSTV.EXCEPTION_STATUS_CD,
NPOSTV.DISTI_POS_TRX_TYPE_CD /*Added as part of OA-POS Q4FY15 to distinguish different POS transactions*/
/* NRS MPOB Changes */
,NPOSTV.ATTRIBUTION_CD
,NPOSTV.PARENT_OFFER_ATTRIB_ID_INT
,NPOSTV.POB_TYPE_CD
,NPOSTV.DV_POB_TOP_PRDT_KEY
,NPOSTV.AS_ARCHITECTURE_FLG
,NPOSTV.BOOKINGS_POLICY_CD
/*Added as part of SFP FY21 March Rel*/
,NPOSTV.UNIT_NET_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT
,NPOSTV.UNIT_GLOBL_LIST_PRC_LCL_AMT
,NPOSTV.UNIT_WHOLESALE_LST_PRC_LCL_AMT
,NPOSTV.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_RATE
FROM
$$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_TRX_LINE_OFFER_ATRBTN_TV NPOSTV
WHERE CAST(NPOSTV.END_TV_DTM AS TIMESTAMP(0))='3500-01-01 00:00:00'
